list.name: agent
list.label: Agent
list.query: SELECT role_name FROM argo_private.agent_meta WHERE is_active ORDER BY role_name

targets.rawSql: SELECT am.role_name, am.display_name, ap.agent_role, lc.provider, lc.model_name, ap.max_steps, am.is_active FROM argo_private.agent_meta am JOIN argo_private.agent_profile_assignments apa ON apa.role_name = am.role_name JOIN argo_private.agent_profiles ap ON ap.profile_id = apa.profile_id JOIN argo_private.llm_configs lc ON lc.llm_config_id = apa.llm_config_id WHERE am.role_name = ANY (string_to_array('${agent:csv}', ',')) OR '${agent:csv}' = '$__all' ORDER BY am.role_name

SELECT now() AS time, count(*)::int AS value FROM argo_private.tasks t JOIN argo_private.agent_meta am ON am.agent_id = t.agent_id WHERE t.status = 'completed' AND t.updated_at > now() - interval '24 hours' AND (am.role_name = ANY (string_to_array('${agent:csv}', ',')) OR '${agent:csv}' = '$__all')

SELECT now() AS time, COALESCE(AVG(steps),0)::float AS value FROM (SELECT t.task_id, COUNT(el.log_id) AS steps FROM argo_private.tasks t JOIN argo_private.agent_meta am ON am.agent_id = t.agent_id LEFT JOIN argo_private.execution_logs el ON el.task_id = t.task_id AND el.role = 'assistant' WHERE t.status = 'completed' AND t.updated_at > now() - interval '24 hours' AND (am.role_name = ANY (string_to_array('${agent:csv}', ',')) OR '${agent:csv}' = '$__all') GROUP BY t.task_id) s

SELECT date_trunc('hour', t.updated_at) AS time, am.role_name AS metric, count(*)::int AS value FROM argo_private.tasks t JOIN argo_private.agent_meta am ON am.agent_id = t.agent_id WHERE $__timeFilter(t.updated_at) AND t.status='completed' AND (am.role_name = ANY (string_to_array('${agent:csv}', ',')) OR '${agent:csv}' = '$__all') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT am.role_name AS agent, t.name AS tool, t.tool_type, p.granted_at FROM argo_private.agent_tool_permissions p JOIN argo_private.agent_meta am ON am.agent_id = p.agent_id JOIN argo_private.tool_registry t ON t.tool_id = p.tool_id WHERE am.role_name = ANY (string_to_array('${agent:csv}', ',')) OR '${agent:csv}' = '$__all' ORDER BY am.role_name, t.name

SELECT t.task_id, am.role_name AS agent, t.input, t.output AS reason, t.updated_at FROM argo_private.tasks t JOIN argo_private.agent_meta am ON am.agent_id = t.agent_id WHERE t.status='failed' AND t.updated_at > now() - interval '7 days' AND (am.role_name = ANY (string_to_array('${agent:csv}', ',')) OR '${agent:csv}' = '$__all') ORDER BY t.updated_at DESC LIMIT 50
